vision_report.compositional_truth_check: Registry vs. Reality: P1 (Yellow Pot) is present but appears devoid of foliage. P2/P4 (Black Pot) contains a single, struggling sprout. P3 (Black Pot) contains the rabbit anchor and a single leaf. The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current biomass.

inventory_reconciliation.New_Intervention: Presence of crushed eggshells in P3/P4 soil surface.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil, no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil, no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: Single Pothos leaf remains; rabbit anchor is stable.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Crushed eggshells present in the black pot; electronic component (IC chip) visible in early images, removed in later frames.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Initial state shows a single green sprout in the black pot. The sprout exhibits a slow, downward postural collapse.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Sprout continues to lose turgor pressure, leaning further into the soil.
temporal_deltas.CURRENT: The sprout has effectively withered or retracted; only a small, pale green remnant remains.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of severe decline. The lack of foliage in P1 and P2 suggests total failure. The Pothos in P3 is the only surviving specimen, though it is isolated. The sprout in the black pot is suffering from terminal dehydration or root rot, evidenced by the loss of structural integrity.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at calcium supplementation or soil amendment, which has not prevented the decline of the sprout.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment has undergone a catastrophic reduction in biomass over the 5-day observation period. What began as a multi-specimen setup has collapsed into a near-barren state. The 'Systemic Loss' of P1, P2, and P4 indicates a failure in the micro-climate or maintenance regime. The remaining Pothos leaf is the only sign of life, while the sprout in the black pot has succumbed to a rapid decline.
